summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JoyTracker happiness tracking application. Both backend API and frontend UI are working correctly with 90%+ success rate.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 520 Internal Server Error instead of 401 when no authorization header provided
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - error handling for unauthorized requests

passed_tests: User registration with login, password, and hint
Happiness score calculation for all period types (week/month/quarter/half-year/year/custom)
Home page with happiness speedometer display
Assessment page with 10 harmonious state groups
Assessment page with 10 disharmonious state groups
Happiness score formula calculation (10 × harmonious / (harmonious + disharmonious))
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Update error handling in backend auth endpoints to return proper 401 status instead of 520 when authorization header is missing
